response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, some Java/C++), but the resume shows no substantive work with Kotlin, the Spring ecosystem, Quarkus, Hibernate, or IDE/language tooling internals. Java appears only as a listed skill with minimal project context, and there is no evidence of deep JVM expertise or interest in IDE internals, which are central to this role.
strengths: Long track record on complex, large-scale systems across multiple domains
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, dojos)
Some prior IDE-adjacent experience (C/C++ on NI LabWindows/CVI)
concerns: No demonstrated Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate or enterprise JVM framework experience
Kotlin is absent from skills and employment history
No evidence of IDE internals or language tooling work on the JVM

key_factors.factor: Proven experience on complex large-scale systems
